Name: Average time from Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Total time between Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE across all cases
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE after the execution of Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time for Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Time from Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER in variants where both activities occur
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in successful variants involving pre-approval
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average time until Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE is performed after case initiation
Metric: The average of the duration between the start of the case and activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE in cases that eventually lead to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER in rejected variants
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Time of Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE compared to the time of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in variants containing rejections by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE after Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE in cases that undergo pre-approval
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Total time from Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE to Request Payment in variants that include Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER followed by resubmission
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Minimum time for Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE in cases that avoid any rejection by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE and the end of the case

Name: Time from Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in variants with no subsequent rejection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER after the execution of Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE in multi-rejection loops
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'
